scripts.dev:clean: lsof -i tcp:3000 && lsof -i tcp:3001 && lsof -i tcp:3002
scripts.build:remotes: npx pnpm --filter react-mfe run build && pnpm --filter vue-mfe run build
scripts.build: npx pnpm run build:remotes && npx pnpm --filter shell run build
scripts.install:apps: npm i --prefix shell && npm i --prefix react-mfe && npm i --prefix vue-mfe
